description_long: This is a modern, black pickup truck with a rugged and robust design, featuring four doors and a spacious cargo bed at the rear. The vehicle is equipped with large, off-road tires and visible side steps, suggesting it is built for both urban and off-road environments. The cargo bed contains two large cylindrical objects, possibly spare tires or equipment, secured with a visible rack. The front end has a bold grille and pronounced hood vents, while the rear showcases a reinforced bumper and tailgate. The windows are tinted, and the overall body has a matte, slightly weathered finish. Chrome accents are present on the wheels and side steps, adding a touch of style to its utilitarian appearance.
description: A black, four-door pickup truck with a cargo bed containing two large cylinders, rugged tires, and chrome accents. The design is robust and suitable for both urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the cargo bed with two large cylindrical objects and the tailgate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, side steps, and the cargo bed contents.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the bold grille, hood vents, and front bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the cargo bed and side details.
